title: IGL Forms Joint Venture With HWT for Biogas and Biofuel Projects
content: Indraprastha Gas Ltd (IGL) has entered into a joint venture with Hindustan Waste Treatment Private Ltd (HWT) to develop compressed biogas (CBG) plants and pursue other biofuel initiatives. Under the agreement, both partners will hold an equal 50% equity stake, with the joint ventureâ€™s board initially comprising four directors, two nominated by each company. The partnership is intended to strengthen IGLâ€™s presence in renewable energy and clean fuels, in line with its long-term diversification strategy. In a separate financial update, IGL reported a 4.5% quarter-on-quarter increase in net profit, reaching â‚¹372 crore in Q2, compared with â‚¹356 crore in the previous quarter. The companyâ€™s revenue also rose 2.8% to â‚¹4,022 crore, up from â‚¹3,913 crore, supported by steady demand across its operations.
